title: Render Update v1.2.0 — Editor Overhaul & Bug Fixes
description: Ctrl+V paste now works — copy elements with Ctrl+C and paste them back with Ctrl+V.
Locked nodes are now truly locked — they cannot be selected, moved, or deleted until unlocked. Locked nodes show a not-allowed cursor and are visually dimmed.
Layers panel completely overhauled — hover any layer to reveal visibility toggle, lock/unlock, and delete buttons. Double-click a layer name to rename it inline.
Hidden layers are now visually dimmed in the layers panel so you can see at a glance what is visible and what is not.
Arrow key nudging is now undoable — moving elements with arrow keys is tracked in history and can be reversed with Ctrl+Z.
H shortcut conflict fixed — pressing H switches to the Hand tool, Shift+H is now free for Flip Horizontal without accidentally switching tools.
Flip Horizontal and Flip Vertical now work correctly on Figma-imported elements.
Code view app name now stays in sync with the export modal — changing the app name in Export updates the Code panel instantly.
Preview mode now shows all canvas elements even without a Frame — drop anything onto the canvas and it appears in Preview immediately.
Preview mode error display — if something goes wrong in the preview, you now see the error message instead of a blank screen.
Fixed canvas left sidebar sceneNodesToFrames import removed — eliminates a legacy dependency that could cause state conflicts.
Tabs, Accordion, and Carousel section labels are now editable from the Properties Panel.
Charts now render correct SVG pie slices with support for any number of data points.
Slider value is now stored in node props and persists when you deselect and reselect.
On Hover End trigger added to the Interactions system — lets you reverse animations when the mouse leaves an element.

title: Render Update v1.1.0 — Interactions, Animations & Preview Mode
description: Added Preview Mode — test your app live inside the editor without exporting. Click, hover, navigate between frames, all interactions work in real time.
Added Interactions system — wire up any element with On Click, On Hover, On Load triggers. Navigate to Frame, Show/Hide elements, Open URL, Toggle visibility, Send IPC events.
Added frame transitions — Fade, Slide Left/Right/Up/Down, Scale Up/Down when navigating between screens.
Added Hover Effects — one-click presets: Lift, Glow, Scale, Dim, Brighten, Border Glow. Applied instantly to any element.
Added animation blocks — Fade In, Slide Up, Scale Up, Pulse, Shake, Bounce with configurable duration and delay.
Fixed 40+ component assets — Navbar, Sidebar, Card, Modal, Table, Charts, Form, Pricing Card, Kanban, Timeline and more now render with real visual structure instead of blank boxes.
Tabs, Accordion, and Carousel are now interactive in the editor — click to switch tabs, expand sections, and slide through carousel items.
Slider thumb is now draggable in the editor.
Charts now read from editable data fields — update comma-separated values in the Properties Panel to change chart data live.
Fixed opacity, rotation, and flip rendering on the canvas.
Fixed checkbox and switch toggle on click in the editor.

title: Render Update v1.0.1
description: Fixed major bugs
